message:
Fix OG images on X/Twitter: use absolute URLs

- Add site: 'https://walkingdevs.com' to astro.config.mjs
- Resolve og:image and twitter:image to absolute URLs
- Fixes og:url from localhost to production domain

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/fc440dsoqbc7o23krwlfnbv9

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,11 @@ interface Props {
 
 const { title, description, ogImage } = Astro.props
 const canonicalUrl = Astro.site ? new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site) : Astro.url
+const ogImageUrl = ogImage
+  ? Astro.site
+    ? new URL(ogImage, Astro.site).toString()
+    : ogImage
+  : null
 ---
 
 <!doctype html>
@@ -34,15 +39,15 @@ const canonicalUrl = Astro.site ? new URL(Astro.url.pathname, Astro.site) : Astr
     <meta property="og:url" content={canonicalUrl} />
     <meta property="og:title" content={title} />
     <meta property="og:description" content={description} />
-    {ogImage && <meta property="og:image" content={ogImage} />}
+    {ogImageUrl && <meta property="og:image" content={ogImageUrl} />}
     <meta property="og:image:width" content="1200" />
     <meta property="og:image:height" content="630" />
 
     <!-- Twitter -->
     <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
     <meta name="twitter:title" content={title} />
     <meta name="twitter:description" content={description} />
-    {ogImage && <meta name="twitter:image" content={ogImage} />}
+    {ogImageUrl && <meta name="twitter:image" content={ogImageUrl} />}
   </head>
   <body class="min-h-screen">
     <slot />
